Bash(python3 << 'PYTHON_SCRIPT'
from reportlab.lib import colors
from reportlab.lib.pagesizes import A4
from reportlab.platypus import SimpleDocTemplate, Paragraph, Spacer, Table, TableStyle, PageBreak
from reportlab.lib.styles import getSampleStyleSheet, ParagraphStyle
from reportlab.lib.units import cm
from reportlab.lib.colors import HexColor

# 桌面路径
desktop_path = r"C:\\Users\\19579\\Desktop\\Java 全栈学习计划.pdf"

# 创建 PDF 文档
doc = SimpleDocTemplate\(desktop_path, pagesize=A4, rightMargin=2cm, leftMargin=2cm, topMargin=2cm, bottomMargin=2cm\)
elements = []

# 样式
styles = getSampleStyleSheet\(\)
title_style = ParagraphStyle\(name='Title', parent=styles['Heading1'], fontSize=24, textColor=HexColor\('#1a73e8'\), spaceAfter=20, alignment=1\)
heading_style = ParagraphStyle\(name='Heading', parent=styles['Heading2'], fontSize=16, textColor=HexColor\('#2c3e50'\), spaceAfter=15, spaceBefore=15\)
subheading_style = ParagraphStyle\(name='SubHeading', parent=styles['Heading3'], fontSize=12, textColor=HexColor\('#34495e'\), spaceAfter=10, leftIndent=10\)
normal_style = ParagraphStyle\(name='Normal', parent=styles['Normal'], fontSize=10, spaceAfter=8, leading=14\)

# 标题
elements.append\(Paragraph\("🚀 30 天 Java 全栈速成计划", title_style\)\)
elements.append\(Paragraph\("专为精通前端的开发者定制 | 每天 3-4 小时", ParagraphStyle\(name='Subtitle', parent=styles['Normal'], fontSize=10, alignment=1, textColor=HexColor\('#666666'\), spaceAfter=30\)\)\)

# 优势
elements.append\(Paragraph\("你的优势", heading_style\)\)
advantage_data = [["HTTP/REST 基础", "前端框架经验", "Node.js 经验"], ["无需学习 HTTP 概念", "联调无障碍", "后端概念易理解"]]
advantage_table = Table\(advantage_data, colWidths=[5*cm, 5*cm, 5*cm]\)
advantage_table.setStyle\(TableStyle\([\('BACKGROUND', \(0,0\), \(-1,0\), HexColor\('#667eea'\)\), \('TEXTCOLOR', \(0,0\), \(-1,0\), colors.whitesmoke\), \('ALIGN', \(0,0\), \(-1,-1\), 'CENTER'\), \('FONTNAME', \(0,0\), \(-1,0\), 'Helvetica-Bold'\), \('FONTSIZE', \(0,0\), \(-1,-1\), 10\), \('BOTTOMPADDING', \(0,0\), \(-1,0\), 12\), \('BACKGROUND', \(0,1\), \(-1,1\), HexColor\('#a8edea'\)\), \('GRID', \(0,0\), \(-1,-1\), 0.5, colors.grey\)]\)\)
elements.append\(advantage_table\)
elements.append\(Spacer\(1, 20\)\)

# 第 1 周
elements.append\(Paragraph\("📅 第 1 周：Spring Boot 核心", heading_style\)\)
week1_data = [["天数", "内容", "产出"], ["Day 1", "第一个 Spring Boot 应用", "能运行的项目，3 个测试接口"], ["Day 2", "请求参数处理", "完善用户管理 API"], ["Day 3", "JPA 操作数据库", "能操作数据库的 Repository"], ["Day 4", "MySQL 数据库", "配置好数据库连接"], ["Day 5-6", "用户管理系统实战", "完整 CRUD 接口"], ["Day 7", "JWT 认证", "登录/注册接口"]]
week1_table = Table\(week1_data, colWidths=[2*cm, 6*cm, 6*cm]\)
week1_table.setStyle\(TableStyle\([\('BACKGROUND', \(0,0\), \(-1,0\), HexColor\('#667eea'\)\), \('TEXTCOLOR', \(0,0\), \(-1,0\), colors.whitesmoke\), \('ALIGN', \(0,0\), \(-1,-1\), 'LEFT'\), \('FONTNAME', \(0,0\), \(-1,0\), 'Helvetica-Bold'\), \('FONTSIZE', \(0,0\), \(-1,-1\), 9\), \('BOTTOMPADDING', \(0,0\), \(-1,0\), 10\), \('TOPPADDING', \(0,0\), \(-1,-1\), 6\), \('GRID', \(0,0\), \(-1,-1\), 0.5, colors.grey\), \('BACKGROUND', \(0,1\), \(-1,-1\), colors.whitesmoke\)]\)\)
elements.append\(week1_table\)
elements.append\(Spacer\(1, 15\)\)

# 第 2 周
elements.append\(Paragraph\("📅 第 2 周：项目实战", heading_style\)\)
elements.append\(Paragraph\("🎯 项目：AI 对话管理系统 - 符合公司前后端合并方向", subheading_style\)\)
week2_data = [["天数", "内容", "产出"], ["Day 8-9", "数据库设计", "用户表、对话表、消息表"], ["Day 10-12", "后端 API 开发", "认证、对话、消息、AI 接口"], ["Day 13-14", "前端开发 \(React\)", "登录页、对话列表、聊天界面"]]
week2_table = Table\(week2_data, colWidths=[2.5*cm, 6.5*cm, 5.5*cm]\)
week2_table.setStyle\(TableStyle\([\('BACKGROUND', \(0,0\), \(-1,0\), HexColor\('#764ba2'\)\), \('TEXTCOLOR', \(0,0\), \(-1,0\), colors.whitesmoke\), \('ALIGN', \(0,0\), \(-1,-1\), 'LEFT'\), \('FONTNAME', \(0,0\), \(-1,0\), 'Helvetica-Bold'\), \('FONTSIZE', \(0,0\), \(-1,-1\), 9\), \('BOTTOMPADDING', \(0,0\), \(-1,0\), 10\), \('TOPPADDING', \(0,0\), \(-1,-1\), 6\), \('GRID', \(0,0\), \(-1,-1\), 0.5, colors.grey\), \('BACKGROUND', \(0,1\), \(-1,-1\), colors.whitesmoke\)]\)\)
elements.append\(week2_table\)
elements.append\(PageBreak\(\)\)

# 第 3 周
elements.append\(Paragraph\("📅 第 3 周：部署 + AI 集成", heading_style\)\)
week3_data = [["天数", "内容", "产出"], ["Day 15-16", "项目打包部署", "线上可访问的项目"], ["Day 17-19", "AI 集成", "Claude API 调用、流式响应"], ["Day 20-21", "简历 + 面试准备", "作品集、GitHub 仓库"]]
week3_table = Table\(week3_data, colWidths=[2.5*cm, 6.5*cm, 5.5*cm]\)
week3_table.setStyle\(TableStyle\([\('BACKGROUND', \(0,0\), \(-1,0\), HexColor\('#667eea'\)\), \('TEXTCOLOR', \(0,0\), \(-1,0\), colors.whitesmoke\), \('ALIGN', \(0,0\), \(-1,-1\), 'LEFT'\), \('FONTNAME', \(0,0\), \(-1,0\), 'Helvetica-Bold'\), \('FONTSIZE', \(0,0\), \(-1,-1\), 9\), \('BOTTOMPADDING', \(0,0\), \(-1,0\), 10\), \('TOPPADDING', \(0,0\), \(-1,-1\), 6\), \('GRID', \(0,0\), \(-1,-1\), 0.5, colors.grey\), \('BACKGROUND', \(0,1\), \(-1,-1\), colors.whitesmoke\)]\)\)
elements.append\(week3_table\)
elements.append\(Spacer\(1, 20\)\)

# 打卡表
elements.append\(Paragraph\("✅ 进度打卡表", heading_style\)\)
checklist_data = [["周次", "D1", "D2", "D3", "D4", "D5", "D6", "D7"], ["第 1 周", "⬜", "⬜", "⬜", "⬜", "⬜", "⬜", "⬜"], ["第 2 周", "⬜", "⬜", "⬜", "⬜", "⬜", "⬜", "⬜"], ["第 3 周", "⬜", "⬜", "⬜", "⬜", "⬜", "⬜", "⬜"]]
checklist_table = Table\(checklist_data, colWidths=[2*cm, 1.5*cm, 1.5*cm, 1.5*cm, 1.5*cm, 1.5*cm, 1.5*cm, 1.5*cm]\)
checklist_table.setStyle\(TableStyle\([\('BACKGROUND', \(0,0\), \(-1,0\), HexColor\('#2c3e50'\)\), \('TEXTCOLOR', \(0,0\), \(-1,0\), colors.whitesmoke\), \('ALIGN', \(0,0\), \(-1,-1\), 'CENTER'\), \('FONTNAME', \(0,0\), \(-1,0\), 'Helvetica-Bold'\), \('FONTSIZE', \(0,0\), \(-1,-1\), 9\), \('GRID', \(0,0\), \(-1,-1\), 0.5, colors.grey\)]\)\)
elements.append\(checklist_table\)
elements.append\(Spacer\(1, 20\)\)

# 工具
elements.append\(Paragraph\("🛠️ 开发工具", heading_style\)\)
tools_data = [["用途", "工具"], ["IDE", "IntelliJ IDEA（社区版免费）"], ["数据库", "MySQL Workbench / DBeaver"], ["API 测试", "Postman / Apifox"], ["版本控制", "Git"]]
tools_table = Table\(tools_data, colWidths=[5*cm, 9*cm]\)
tools_table.setStyle\(TableStyle\([\('BACKGROUND', \(0,0\), \(-1,0\), HexColor\('#34495e'\)\), \('TEXTCOLOR', \(0,0\), \(-1,0\), colors.whitesmoke\), \('ALIGN', \(0,0\), \(-1,-1\), 'LEFT'\), \('FONTNAME', \(0,0\), \(-1,0\), 'Helvetica-Bold'\), \('FONTSIZE', \(0,0\), \(-1,-1\), 9\), \('BOTTOMPADDING', \(0,0\), \(-1,0\), 10\), \('GRID', \(0,0\), \(-1,-1\), 0.5, colors.grey\)]\)\)
elements.append\(tools_table\)

# 结尾
elements.append\(PageBreak\(\)\)
elements.append\(Paragraph\("💡 学习建议", heading_style\)\)
tips = ["每天至少 2-3 小时 - 保持连续性", "动手写代码 - 不要只看教程", "遇到问题先 Google - 培养解决问题能力", "记录学习笔记 - 方便复习", "加入技术社群 - 互相帮助"]
for tip in tips:
    elements.append\(Paragraph\(f"• {tip}", normal_style\)\)

elements.append\(Spacer\(1, 30\)\)
elements.append\(Paragraph\("坚持就是胜利！21 天后你就是全栈工程师！🚀", ParagraphStyle\(name='Final', parent=styles['Normal'], fontSize=12, alignment=1, textColor=HexColor\('#1a73e8'\), spaceBefore=20\)\)\)
elements.append\(Spacer\(1, 10\)\)
elements.append\(Paragraph\("项目位置：D:\\\\code\\\\code\\\\status\\\\", ParagraphStyle\(name='Path', parent=styles['Normal'], fontSize=9, alignment=1, textColor=HexColor\('#666666'\)\)\)\)

# 构建 PDF
doc.build\(elements\)
print\(f"PDF 已生成：{desktop_path}"\)
PYTHON_SCRIPT)
